title: How a godly man prepares for the right woman
caption:
The desperate man signals it before he opens his mouth.

She can tell. The neediness, the performance, the constant angling — it's the opposite of what actually draws a woman worth having.

You're not called to chase her. You're called to chase God and become the man He designed. Fix the gaze. Build the man. Get planted in brotherhood. Walk clean in the places no one sees.

The right woman comes into something solid — not something searching.

Save this if you're in the building season.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #christianity #scripture #brotherhood
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
